title: senecio carbonellii
intro: Senecio carbonellii, also known as Carbonell's ragwort, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the Canary Islands. The plant contains pyrrolizidine alkaloids, which possess medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The health benefits of Senecio carbonellii include its ability to soothe and calm respiratory problems, as well as its potential anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Senecio carbonellii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
